ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

With ThisForm

	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)

		ThisForm.Refresh
		ThisForm.Draw
		ThisForm.Show

		If Not ThisForm.Processa()
			MessageBox('Erro no Processamento dos Dados...',0+48,'')
			Return .f.
		Endif

	Else
		=Messagebox('Impossível Efetuar Conexăo Com o Servidor de Banco de Dados...', 0+48, 'CreateObject')
		Return .... [TRUNCADO]

If MessageBox('Deseja Realmente abandonar Priorizaçăo',4+32+256,'') = 6
	ThisForm.Release
EndIf

Thisform.LockScreen = .T.

ThisForm.Get_Cliente.Value = zTmpSelecao.Rclis
ThisForm.Get_Cliente.Refresh

Select zTmppPcp
Go Top

ThisForm.FigJpg.Visible = .F.
ThisForm.FigJpg.Picture = ''

Select zTmpSelecao

=ThisForm.PodataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery,'CrTmpPro')

Select zTmpSelecao
Set Relation To 
Set Order To 
Do Case
	Case Alltrim(This.Value) = "Prazo Entrega"
		Set Order to Entrega

	Case Alltrim(This.Value) = "Cliente"
		Set Order to Cliente

	Case Alltrim(This.Value) = 'Operacao'
		Set Order To EmpDopNum

	Case Alltrim(This.Value) = 'Prioridade'
		Set Order To Prioridade
EndCase

Select zTmpSelecao
Set Relation To Emps + dopes + Str(numes,6) Into zTmppPcp

ThisForm.Grade.Refresh

If MessageBox('Confirma Gravaçăo dos Dados!!!',4+32+256) = 7
	Return .f.
EndIf

Select zTmpSelecao
Scan
	Scatter Memvar
	Wait Window 'Executando Gravaçăo de Prioridades ' Nowait
	If m.Priors = 0 And m.aPriors = 0
		Loop
	Endif

	lcEdn = m.Emps + m.Dopes + Str(m.Numes,6)
	
	lcSql = [Update SigMvCab Set Priors = ]+Str(zTmpSelecao.Priors)+[ Where EmpDopNums = ']+lcEdn+[']
	ThisForm.Podatamgr.Sqlexecute(lcsql,'')
	
EndScan

Wait Window 'Executando Gravaçăo Fisica dos arquivos ' Nowait
